scripts.start:node: sh -c "if command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1; then bun src/node.ts; else npm run build:node && node dist/node.js; fi"
scripts.test:integration: bunx --bun vitest run test/usps.integration.test.ts test/uniuni.integration.test.ts test/ups.integration.test.ts test/amazon.import.integration.test.ts
scripts.test:integration:carriers: bunx --bun vitest run test/usps.integration.test.ts test/uniuni.integration.test.ts test/ups.integration.test.ts
